use_cases: Displaying animated Vietnamese greeting text 'xin chào' for international audiences
Adding entrance animations to hero sections with geometric text styling
Creating Samsung-style bold tech effects for marketing campaigns
ai_summary: An animated SVG text effect component that renders the Vietnamese greeting 'xin chào' with geometric stroke animations. Uses Framer Motion for pathLength, opacity, scale, and 3D rotateY animations with spring physics. Features square stroke caps and a bold tech aesthetic inspired by Samsung-style visuals. Perfect for hero sections, loading states, or international marketing materials requiring animated multilingual typography.
